sections.paragraph:
σύμφωνος, ον (s. συμφωνία; Hom. Hymns, Pla. et al.; ins, pap, 4 Macc; Ar. 13, 5; Tat. 25, 2; Ath.; adv. συμφώνως Ath., R. 23 p. 77, 4)

① pert. to being in tune with, attuned to, harmonious, in imagery IEph 4:1, 2; 5:1.

② pert. to being in agreement, agreeing (EpArist 302; Jos., C. Ap. 2, 169, Ant. 15, 408); subst. τὸ σύμφωνον agreement (Philo): ἐκ συμφώνου by agreement (PLond II, 334, 19 p. 211 [166 a.d.]; PHamb 15, 8; PStras 14, 13; BGU 446, 13 al. in pap) 1 Cor 7:5.—M-M. TW. Spicq. Sv.

Hom Hom , VIII b.c.—List 5

Pla Pla , V–IV b.c.; s. also Ps.-Plato—List 5

et al. et al. = et alii (and others)

ins Ins, ins = Inscription, Inschrift, inscription(s). Without a period, esp. in lists, as at the beginning of entries; the capitalized form is used in titles. In conjunction with literary works this abbr. refers to the title or description of contents.

pap pap = papyrus, -yri

Ar. Ar. = Aristides, apologist, II a.d.—List 5

Tat Tat , II a.d.—List 5

Ath. Ath. = Athenagoras, II a.d.—List 5

adv. adv. = adverb, adverbially

pert. pert. = pertaining (to)

IEph IEph = Ignatius to the Ephesians—List 1

EpArist EpArist = Epistle of Aristeas, II b.c.—List 5

Jos. Jos. = Josephus. This abbr. used when follow by title; I a.d.—Lists 5

subst. subst. = substantive(ly)

Philo Philo = P. of Alexandria, I b.c.–I a.d.—List 5

PLond PLond = PLondon=Greek Papyri in the British Museum—List 4

PHamb PHamb = Griechische Papyrusurkunden der Hamburger Staats- und Universitätsbibliothek—List 4

PStras PStras = Griechische Papyrus der kaiserlichen Universitäts- und Landesbibliothek zu Strassburg—List 4

BGU BGU = Aegyptische Urkunden aus den Museen zu Berlin: Griechische Urkunden—List 4

  1. al. =alibi (elsewhere), aliter (otherwise), alii (others)

M-M M-M = JMoulton/GMilligan, Vocabulary of Greek Testament—Lists 4, 6

TW TW = Theologisches Wörterbuch zum NT; tr. GBromiley, Theological Dictionary of the NT—List 6

Spicq Spicq = CS., Lexique théologique du Nouveau Testament—Lists 6

Sv Sv (at the end of entries)=HSieben, Voces—List 6

Arndt, William ; Danker, Frederick W. ; Bauer, Walter: A Greek-English Lexicon of the New Testament and Other Early Christian Literature. 3rd ed. Chicago : University of Chicago Press, 2000, S. 961
